{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wagō Kasuga Shrine'''|和合春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].
